_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: Detailed FACS analysis indicates again that the number of activated T cells, including the fraction of activated cytotoxic CD8+ T cells, is higher in the draining lymph nodes of Nf1 +/− mice
details: Successfully identified activated cytotoxic CD8+ T cells by FACS analysis, showing higher fractions in Nf1+/− mice draining lymph nodes
